zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Cantilupe於1199年出生在英國貝德福爾時，她的父親Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe49歲，母親Mesceline or Sibilla Braci37歲。她於大約1223年與Robert Saint John在英國英格蘭哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1279年之後在英國哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Cantilupe于1199年出生在英国貝德福爾时，她的父亲Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe49岁，母亲Mesceline or Sibilla Braci37岁。她于大约1223年与Robert Saint John在英国英格兰哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1279年之后在英国哈普爾笛卡爾 巴辛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Cantilupe was born in 1199, in Bedfordshire, England, her father, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, was 49 and her mother, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, was 37. She married Robert Saint John about 1223, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1279, in Old Basing, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Cantilupe est née en 1199, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Saint John environ 1223, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1279, à Old Basing, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Cantilupe 1199 in Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe 49 und ihre Mutter Mesceline or Sibilla Braci 37. Sie hat um 1223 in Old Basing, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Saint John geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1279 in Old Basing, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Cantilupe è nata il nel 1199 nel Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Robert Saint John circa 1223, nel Old Basing, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1279, nel Old Basing, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Cantilupeが1199年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupeは49歳，母Mesceline or Sibilla Braciは37歳であった。約1223年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングでRobert Saint Johnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1279年以後にイギリスハンプシュアイアオルド バシングで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Cantilupe(이)가 1199년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mesceline or Sibilla Braci(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1223년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 드 바징에서 Robert Saint John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 이후 영국 함프실르 드 바징에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Cantilupe nasceu em 1199, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Saint John aproximadamente 1223, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1279, em Old Basing, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Cantilupe родилась в 1199 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Saint John около 1223 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1279 г. в местности олд басинг, хампшир, Англия.
